title: Rename device - close/open the Settings screen
scenario: Renamed device name does not persist after closing and reopening the Device Settings > General screen
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the connected device name to enter Device Settings.
Tap the device's official name field.
Enter a new name for the device.
Tap Done to save the new name.
Close the Settings screen (e.g., navigate back to Home or exit the app).
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate back to Device Settings > General.
expected: The new device name is still displayed in the General settings after reopening.
